meaning: adj.出类拔萃的,无可匹敌的
examples: People say: “Guilin's scenery is peerless in the world.” It was not until I visited the place that I found it really worthy of the reputation.
How peerless is the Light that in Him shines!
I exceed the peerless student who has excessive excellence.
He has been described as peerless, and I agree: who else can rival De Niro?
The other problem is that the outfit gets lost in the peerless playing of the game.
